# @tyravel/cli

The Tyravel command-line interface

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/cli
```

| Field | Value |

| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/cli`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/cli) |
